videos.title: Amateur Cross Country Skiing April 2014
videos.description: Cross Country Skiing at Rocky Lane, Alberta. Found the main trail very icy/hard to skate-ski on, so I stuck with the tracks. One wipeout while trying to get back into track. April 2014

videos.title: 野沢温泉人気NO.1  スカイラインコース　NOZAWA ONSEN SKYLINE COURSE 2022.03.05
videos.description:
野沢温泉スキー場の人気NO.1コースの呼び声高い『スカイラインコース』に土曜日の朝一滑ってきましたので、ぜひご覧ください。
各所に説明を入れていますので、案内動画/道案内としてもご覧いただけます。

00:00 タイトル
00:14 長坂ゴンドラやまびこ駅
00:34 スカイライン連絡ペアリフト
00:52 スカイラインコース　スタート
03:13 スカイラインコース　中腹
04:52 少し休憩
05:24 再スタート！
06:27 キツネコース
07:34 長坂ゲレンデ

＃長野　＃北信　＃野沢温泉　＃野沢温泉村　＃温泉　＃パウダー　＃スキー場　＃野沢温泉スキー場　＃スノーボード　＃スキー　＃カービング　＃コース案内　＃スカイラインコース　＃スカイライン　＃NOZAWA　＃ONSEN　＃SKI　＃SNOWBOARD　#JAPAW　#MANJU

videos.title: 100km Nozawaonsen Ski Challenge
videos.description:
In this adventure my flip flops take me to Nozawaonsen where I take on the challenge of skiing 100km in one day.

SOCIAL NETWORKING
******************************************************
YouTube: flip flop navigator
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/flipflopnavigator/
Instagram: flipflopnavigator
Twitter: @flipflopnavi

MUSIC
**************************************************
Ishikari Lore - Kevin MacLeod is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution license (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
Source: http://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/index.html?isrc=USUAN1100192
Artist: http://incompetech.com/

videos.title: THINGS GET MESSY - SKIER v SNOWBOARDER GRUDGE RACE in Nozawa Onsen | 野沢温泉村 日本 JAPAN | Ep 23 2024
videos.description:
konichiwa kimono wearers, you are joining us today for a real ding-dong battle, Little Udon, the pocket rocket, has challenged the smooth riding Deelite to a race. 

These two are going head-to-head in Nozawa Onsen in a winner takes all race. Will it be Little Udon skiing her way to victory or does Deelite have what it takes to come out in front? All is revealed in this vid, so come and join us for a bit of fun...

00:00  Welcome and the race begins
00:54  Little Udon's power ballad + Deelite in pursuit
01:28  Little Udon mastering the rollers
02:50  Deelite over the rollers
03:14  The race is heating up
04:34  Deelite hits the jumps
05:11  Little Udon with finish line in sight
05:43  Deelite meets with disaster
06:31  Deelite in struggle town
06:57  Who claims victory?
07:45  Final comments and thanks


For more on my Japan travels check out the following...
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuByy-8FQxXjZq4uPxCNG9Ly09EYSBg_u

For more on my international travels check out the following...
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuByy-8FQxXiYm5Zsv0-zl4MXTwpQ17EO

For more on my Thailand travels check out the following...
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuByy-8FQxXjt1W6nCxM24-etGfNGQeeu

And for more on my golfing struggles check out the following...
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuByy-8FQxXgwCzkJQtS5MF5V-y6S_Tk9


Music I Use: Bensound.com/royalty-free-music
License code: T80OQ1QJVYKQSGCO
